title: cleisostoma demangei
intro: Cleisostoma demangei, also known as the Demange's cleisostoma, is a species of orchid native to New Caledonia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleisostoma demangei are believed to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting against certain bacterial and fungal infections. In traditional herbal preparations, Cleisostoma demangei is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application to utilize its medicinal properties.
